channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government invests £1.2m to train schools in tackling knife crime
item.description: The British government has announced a £1.2 million investment to provide specialist training for up to 250 schools located in knife crime hotspots. The initiative, part of the Safety In and Around Sc...

item.title: Presidential Aspirant Rotimi Explains Reasons for Joining ADC Amid Leadership Challenges
item.description: Abayomi Rotimi, wey dey aspire to become president under the African Democratic Congress (ADC), don talk why e decide join the opposition party even though dem dey face leadership wahala ahead of 2027...

item.title: Middle East Conflict Updates: Trump Administration Responds
item.description: Ongoing tensions in the Middle East are dominating headlines as of April 7, 2026. The news, according to this report, appears to be focused on the reactions and statements from the Trump administratio...

item.title: Deadline for voter registration in AJK extended till April 13
item.description: The Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) Election Commission has officially extended the deadline for voter registration and the revision of electoral rolls for the upcoming 2026 Legislative Assembly election...

item.title: Gauteng teen dies after suspected diving accident at Sharpeville municipal pool
item.description: A 15-year-old boy from Lethabong in Sebokeng, Tshwarelo (Tsoarelo) Likana, died after a suspected diving accident at the Sharpeville municipal swimming pool in the Vaal during the Easter weekend. Acco...

item.title: Supreme Court seeks legislative updates on acts of lasciviousness laws
item.description: The Philippine Supreme Court has urged Congress to amend existing laws concerning acts of lasciviousness, highlighting the need to better protect victims of sexual abuse, particularly minors. The high...

item.title: Transport Canada Seeks Public Input on the Dangers of Bright Vehicle Headlights
item.description: Transport Canada is conducting a survey to gather feedback on the increasing brightness of vehicle headlights, a trend that is raising concerns about road safety. Over the years, LED headlights have b...

item.title: VVINK Shares Their Journey as a Spotify RADAR Philippines Artist
item.description: Spotify RADAR Philippines artist VVINK, a rising star in the P-Pop scene, opens up about their humble beginnings and the milestones that led to their breakthrough. Known for their unique sound and dis...

item.title: Finance Minister Champagne Recuses Himself from Decisions Involving Government High-Speed Rail Project
item.description: OTTAWA — Finance Minister François-Philippe Champagne has disclosed that he will recuse himself from any government decisions related to Alto, the government-owned company tasked with developing the p...

item.title: UK to experience warmest weather of the year with temperatures reaching 24C
item.description: The UK is set to experience the warmest weather of the year so far, with temperatures expected to rise to the high teens and low twenties over the coming days. On Tuesday, southern regions such as the...

item.title: Iran Army Responds to Trump’s Threats, Says Forces Remain Determined
item.description: Iran’s army don talk say the words wey U.S. President Donald Trump yarn no go fit shake their soldiers’ spirit or stop their military movement. Trump, during one speech for Washington, brag say Americ...

item.title: Woman gives birth on Caribbean Airlines flight approaching JFK Airport
item.description: A woman travelling aboard Caribbean Airlines Flight 005 from Kingston, Jamaica, to New York City gave birth as the plane was making its final approach to John F. Kennedy International Airport. Accordi...

item.title: Lagos Fanti Carnival Celebrates Afro-Brazilian Heritage with Colour and Music
item.description: Ahahn! The Lagos Fanti Carnival, also known as the Fanti Festival, just shook Lagos Island! It was a serious display of colours, music and cultural heritage on Easter Monday. Top people, including Gov...

item.title: Cebu Pacific launches ₱88 seat sale to commemorate Araw ng Kagitingan
item.description: In celebration of Araw ng Kagitingan, Cebu Pacific announced a special seat sale offering domestic flights for as low as ₱88. The promotion aims to encourage Filipinos to travel around the country whi...

item.title: Nigeria Army Takes Action Against Terrorists and Kidnappers in Plateau
item.description: The Nigerian Army has made significant strides in tackling security threats in Plateau State. In operations carried out on April 4 and 5, soldiers killed two suspected terrorists during a firefight al...

item.title: NBI cautions public on scam groups posing as officials to solicit donations
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has issued a public warning about criminal syndicates impersonating government officials and well-known personalities to solicit donations for fake non-gover...

item.title: AI Study Identifies Gut Biomarkers for Early Detection of Gastrointestinal Diseases
item.description: Researchers at the University of Birmingham have identified a set of gut microbiome and metabolome markers that could improve early detection of gastrointestinal diseases such as gastric cancer, color...

item.title: Rare Softshell Turtle Found at High Altitude in Bageshwar, Forest Department Plans Survey
item.description: In an unusual event, a softshell turtle has been sighted at an altitude of approximately 2,950 feet in Bageshwar district. The turtle was found in a seasonal stream by Mohan Chandra Joshi, a local res...

item.title: Waitrose under fire for dismissing worker who stopped shoplifter at Clapham Junction store
item.description: Waitrose is facing a significant backlash after dismissing a long-standing employee, Walker Smith, for intervening when a thief attempted to steal Easter eggs at their Clapham Junction branch in Londo...

item.title: A Practical Guide to Beginning Your Home Buying Journey
item.description: Buying a house is a major life and financial milestone that requires careful planning and informed decision-making. The process begins with understanding your financial situation—knowing your budget, ...
